fields.name: Register No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the register number of the entry.

fields.name: Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account number that the entry is linked to.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer entry's posting date.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type that the customer entry belongs to.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the due date on the entry.

fields.name: Account Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account name that the entry is linked to.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for the amount on the line.

fields.name: Currency Factor
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for the amount on the line.

fields.name: Base Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that remains to be applied to before the entry has been completely applied.

fields.name: Base Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that remains to be applied to before the entry is totally applied to.

fields.name: Adjustment Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the exchange rate adjustment amount for the entry.

fields.name: Detailed Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the detailed customer or vendor ledger entry, related to register ledger entry.
